hero.title: Travel experiences built with trusted local experts
hero.subtitle: TourX connects travelers with curated tour packages, verified travel agents, and real community insight so every trip feels easier to choose and better to remember.

mission.title: Make discovery, planning, and local trust feel seamless.
mission.body: Travel marketplaces can feel noisy. TourX is designed to make the important signals clear: what is included, who hosts the experience, where travelers are going, and how people felt after the trip.
mission.card1Body: Adventure, cultural, family, honeymoon, cruise, and business trips organized for clear comparison.
mission.card2Body: Travel agents can build reputation through packages, profiles, reviews, followers, and helpful answers.
mission.card3Body: Traveler posts, comments, and shared tips help people choose with more confidence.

feature.title: A marketplace shaped for real travel decisions
feature.body: TourX keeps the booking journey practical: browse destinations, compare inclusions, save trips, follow agencies, and learn from the community before choosing your next tour.
feature.item2: Saved trips and recently viewed packages

values.title: What guides TourX
values.oneBody: Packages should be easy to scan, compare, and understand.
values.twoBody: Agents and travelers both add context that static listings cannot.
values.threeBody: Good journeys need useful details, responsible expectations, and responsive support.

cta.title: Ready to plan a better trip?
cta.body: Start with curated packages or explore the agents behind each experience.
